title: Syrian Muffin Bake
description: A delicious and moist muffin bake infused with Syrian flavors. Perfect for breakfast or a snack.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together sour milk and honey.
3. Add granola, chopped nuts, and cinnamon to the bowl. Mix until well combined.
4. Add cubed English muffins and mix until coated with the wet ingredients.
5. Pour in chopped apples and mix until evenly distributed.
6. Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the bake is set.
8. Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
10. Store leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.
